objectives: Identify potential weak points in the bug bounty program
Determine the scope of the bug bounty program
tools: Subdomain Search tools like Subfinder, Amass
success_criteria: All target domains are discovered and mapped
All weak points in the bug bounty program are identified
The scope of the bug bounty program is determined

objectives: Analyze the smart contracts and their implementations
tools: Smart contract analyzers like Etherscan, Remix
Vulnerability scanning tools like OpenVAS, Nessus
success_criteria: All potential vulnerability classes are identified
All smart contracts and their implementations are analyzed
All potential attack vectors are determined

objectives: Identify the severity of the vulnerabilities
tools: Exploit frameworks like Metasploit, Burp Suite
Smart contract testing frameworks like Truffle, OpenZeppelin
success_criteria: All hypotheses are tested with payloads
All vulnerabilities are identified and their severity is determined

objectives: Determine the severity of the vulnerabilities
Identify the potential impact of the vulnerabilities
tools: Risk assessment frameworks like NIST, ISO 27001
success_criteria: All potential impact of the vulnerabilities is determined

objectives: Ensure that all findings meet the bug bounty program requirements
success_criteria: All findings are documented and prepared for submission
All submissions meet the bug bounty program requirements
All submissions are prepared for review
